From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Sheriff of Cochise](/w/index.php?title=Sheriff_of_Cochise&redirect=no "Sheriff of Cochise"))

TV program

This article is about the TV show. For the real life position, see [Cochise County Sheriff's Office](/wiki/Cochise_County_Sheriff%27s_Office "Cochise County Sheriff's Office").

| *The Sheriff of Cochise* | |
| --- | --- |
| Genre | * [Police procedural](/wiki/Police_procedural "Police procedural") * [Neo-Western](/wiki/Neo-Western "Neo-Western") |
| Created by | * [Stan Jones](/wiki/Stan_Jones_(songwriter) "Stan Jones (songwriter)") * [Mort Briskin](/w/index.php?title=Mort_Briskin&action=edit&redlink=1 "Mort Briskin (page does not exist)") |

***The Sheriff of Cochise*** is an American [police crime drama](/wiki/Police_procedural "Police procedural") television series of 79 black-and-white episodes broadcast from 1956 to 1958. The show has two seasons of 39 episodes, and there is an additional standalone episode. Each episode runs for 30 minutes. The series features [John Bromfield](/wiki/John_Bromfield "John Bromfield") as Frank Morgan, the sheriff of [Cochise County, Arizona](/wiki/Cochise_County,_Arizona "Cochise County, Arizona"). The series is succeeded by *[U.S. Marshal](/wiki/U.S._Marshal_(TV_series) "U.S. Marshal (TV series)")*, in which Morgan was promoted to be the [United States marshal](/wiki/United_States_Marshals_Service "United States Marshals Service") for [Arizona](/wiki/Arizona "Arizona").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Sheriff_of_Cochise&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

Frank Morgan is the sheriff of [Cochise County, Arizona](/wiki/Cochise_County,_Arizona "Cochise County, Arizona"), and his duties force him to go after people breaking the law in his home county. These include robbers, thugs, con artists, killers, and other lawbreakers. The series is based on [Westerns](/wiki/Western_(genre) "Western (genre)"), though with a contemporary twist as in the [neo-Western](/wiki/Neo-Western "Neo-Western") sub-genre. Morgan drives a [Chrysler](/wiki/Chrysler "Chrysler") station wagon, rarely fights personally, and uses radios and fingerprints to aid in his investigations.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Sheriff_of_Cochise&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

### Main cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Sheriff_of_Cochise&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Main cast")]

* [John Bromfield](/wiki/John_Bromfield "John Bromfield") as Frank Morgan, the sheriff of Cochise County, Arizona (79 episodes)
* [Stan Jones](/wiki/Stan_Jones_(songwriter) "Stan Jones (songwriter)") as Harry Olson, a sheriff's deputy and Morgan's second-in-command (63 episodes)

### Recurring cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Sheriff_of_Cochise&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Recurring cast")]

* [Roy Engel](/wiki/Roy_Engel "Roy Engel") as Bob Tobin, a sheriff's deputy (7 episodes)
* [Joe Kirk](/wiki/Joe_Kirk "Joe Kirk") as Edgar Dawson (4 episodes)
* [Robert Brubaker](/wiki/Robert_Brubaker "Robert Brubaker") as Blake, a sheriff's deputy (3 episodes)
* [Harry Shannon](/wiki/Harry_Shannon_(actor) "Harry Shannon (actor)") as Caleb (3 episodes)
* [Dale Van Sickel](/wiki/Dale_Van_Sickel "Dale Van Sickel") as Clifford (3 episodes)
* [Joseph Sargent](/wiki/Joseph_Sargent "Joseph Sargent") as Amon Lattimer (3 episodes)
* [James Griffith](/wiki/James_Griffith "James Griffith") as Tom Ferguson, a sheriff's deputy (3 episodes)
* [Joe De Santis](/wiki/Joe_De_Santis "Joe De Santis") as Jack Sanford (2 episodes)
* [Peter Whitney](/wiki/Peter_Whitney "Peter Whitney") as Oney (2 episodes)
* [Frank Ferguson](/wiki/Frank_Ferguson "Frank Ferguson") as Briscoe (2 episodes)
* John Dennis as Mike Lawton (2 episodes)
* [Claudia Bryar](/wiki/Claudia_Bryar "Claudia Bryar") as Vera Bennett (2 episodes)
* Alan Wells as Jim Clark, a sheriff's deputy (2 episodes)
* Kathleen Mulqueen as Martha (2 episodes)
* [Frank Richards](/wiki/Frank_Richards_(actor) "Frank Richards (actor)") as Andy (2 episodes)
* Ray Lamont as Fred Sanders (2 episodes)
* [John Doucette](/wiki/John_Doucette "John Doucette") as Vince Walker (2 episodes)
* [Douglass Dumbrille](/wiki/Douglass_Dumbrille "Douglass Dumbrille") as Judson Knox (2 episodes)
* [Trevor Bardette](/wiki/Trevor_Bardette "Trevor Bardette") as Carter (2 episodes)
* [Jack Albertson](/wiki/Jack_Albertson "Jack Albertson") as Greenbriar Merritt (2 episodes)
* [Joseph V. Perry](/wiki/Joseph_V._Perry "Joseph V. Perry") as Tom Wylie (2 episodes)
* [William Forrest](/wiki/William_Forrest_(actor) "William Forrest (actor)") as Whittiker, a local judge (2 episodes)
* [Hugh Sanders](/wiki/Hugh_Sanders "Hugh Sanders") as Ben Blair (2 episodes)
* [Ed Kemmer](/wiki/Ed_Kemmer "Ed Kemmer") as Ed, a sheriff's deputy (2 episodes)
* [Jeanne Bates](/wiki/Jeanne_Bates "Jeanne Bates") as Maude Larkin (2 episodes)
* [Fred Graham](/wiki/Fred_Graham_(actor) "Fred Graham (actor)") as Dave Snyder (2 episodes)
* Mack Williams as Greenwald, a local doctor (2 episodes)
* [Robert Foulk](/wiki/Robert_Foulk "Robert Foulk") as Emory Riggs (2 episodes)
* Helen Wallace as Ellie Murdock (2 episodes)
* [Howard Wendell](/wiki/Howard_Wendell "Howard Wendell") as Edwin Hatrick (2 episodes)
* [Dennis Cross](/wiki/Dennis_Cross "Dennis Cross") as Fred Jameson (2 episodes)
* [Richard Reeves](/wiki/Richard_Reeves_(actor) "Richard Reeves (actor)") as Joe Franklin (2 episodes)
* [Primo Carnera](/wiki/Primo_Carnera "Primo Carnera") as Otto Povich (2 episodes)
* Frank Worden as Joe Heap (2 episodes)
